/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:  PRETRIAL DIVERSION HAS DETERMINE THAT NO RESTITUTION IS OWED AT THIS TIME, THE COURT RESERVES RESTITUTION ORDER,  DEFENDANT REMAINS ON PROBATION/

/CAL:FOR PRETRIAL DIVERSION RESTITUTION PROGRESS REPORT/14 GPROGRESS REPORT/X:CAUSE IS REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR A RESTITUTION PROGRESS REPORT TO BE FILED BY 06-24-09,/DOPU:PRETRIAL DIVERSION/CONT/

/CAL:FOR PRETRIAL DIVERSION RESTITUTION PROGRESS REPORT/14 GPROGRESS REPORT/X:CAUSE IS REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR A RESTITUTION PROGRESS REPORT TO BE FILED BY 04-22-09,/DOPU:PRETRIAL DIVERSION/CONT/
/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ6D/CTS 6/WS/RESTV/X RESTITUTION TO BE MONITORED BY THE PRETRIAL DIVERSION OFFICE,/VF1/SECFEE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/CONTD:PTD RESTITUTION REPORT/DOPU/
/X COMPLAINT AMENDED TO ADD COUNT 2, 594(B)(2)A, PC, A MISDEMEANOR, WIA/I/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/OR/X:DEFENDANT RELEASED TO SPR AND ORDERED TO ABIDE BY ALL SPR REQUIREMENTS, REPORTFIVE TIMES A WEEK,/X:SPR MAY REDUCE REQUIREMENTS AS DEEMED NECESSARY,/987,2/ CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:RESTIT RPT FROM PTD/DAWT/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/PROGPTD:03-18-09/CONTD:RESTIT RPT FROM PTD/DOPU:PTD/
